problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity may resolve Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? by blocking at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
